title: Fix network timeout and retry logic
original_text: Fixed network timeout issues in API client. The client was not retrying failed requests. Implemented exponential backoff for retries. Added timeout configuration per endpoint. Implemented circuit breaker pattern. Added request queuing and throttling. Added network error logging. Result: API calls more reliable under poor network conditions.
expected_subject: fix(network): add retry logic with exponential backoff
expected_body_lines: - Validation: API calls reliable under poor network
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(network): add retry logic with exponential backoff"
